ThingDef.label: unfinished manuscript
ThingDef.description: An unfinished piece of an manuscript.

ThingDef.label: blood mark
ThingDef.description:
A strip of hide leather paper tainted with blood curses. When burned, it draws the attention of rogue cultivators.

On rim worlds where spiritual energy is scarce, evil cultivators require clear coordinates to conduct their raids. Thus, the bloodmark art was devised: blood is dripped onto the leather and imbued with a spell, allowing any wicked cultivators within dozens of Li to clearly perceive the mark’s location.

This positioning skill is crude and primitive, but its low cost makes it widespread. Even unaffiliated Daoists and free cultivators may learn it as a means of contacting allies.
